source_docs.title: Simultaneous quantification of protein-DNA contacts and transcriptomes in single cells
scDam&T-seq combines DNA adenine methyltransferase-based labeling of protein-DNA contact sites with transcriptome sequencing to analyze regulatory programs in single cells
scDam&T-seq combines DNA adenine methyltransferase-based labeling of protein-DNA contact sites with transcriptome sequencing to analyze regulatory programs in single cells

oligos.name: CEL-Seq2 primer (barcoded RT primer)
oligos.role: Reverse-transcription primer that captures polyadenylated mRNA and adds a cell/sample barcode, UMI, Illumina small-RNA adapter and T7 promoter to the transcriptome product.

components.name: Partial Illumina small RNA adapter (RA5)
components.role: Read 1 primer binding site / P5 handle

components.name: V anchor
components.role: 3' anchor base (G/C/A) locking primer at the poly-A boundary

oligos.notes: Protocol design: split 8-nt sample barcode (2x4 nt) alternating with a split 6-nt UMI (2x3 nt); example barcode #1 literal is ...GACGATCNNNGATGNNNTCAT(T)25V. In the original 2019 paper the UMI is a contiguous 6-nt run 5' of a contiguous 8-nt barcode (…CGATCNNNNNN[8-nt barcode](T)25V). 384 barcoded primers provided (Supplementary Table 1/3). Ordered as standard desalted.

oligos.name: DamID2 adapter (double-stranded, barcoded)
oligos.role: Forked double-stranded adapter ligated to DpnI-digested (m6A-GATC) genomic DNA; adds a sample barcode, UMI, Illumina small-RNA adapter and T7 promoter to the protein–DNA (DamID) product.

components.name: Top oligo
components.role: Top strand (fork – T7 promoter – RA5 small-RNA adapter – split UMI/barcode – GA of reconstituted GATC)

components.name: Bottom oligo (5'-phosphorylated)
components.role: Bottom strand; 5' phosphate enables ligation to the blunt DpnI end

components.name: Partial Illumina small RNA adapter (RA5)
components.role: Read 1 primer binding site / P5 handle

components.name: GATC junction
components.role: reconstituted half of the GATC motif at the ligation junction to gDNA

oligos.notes: Top and bottom oligos are annealed 1:1. Protocol version (Supplementary Table 2): 8-nt split barcode + 6-nt split UMI. Original 2019 KBM7 version: 4-nt fork, 3-nt UMI, 8-nt barcode followed by CA (e.g. top TGATCCGGTAATACGACTCACTATAGGGGTTCAGAGTTCTACAGTCCGACGATCNNN[8-nt barcode]CA). Dam-RING1B mESC version: 6-nt fork, 6-nt barcode followed by GA. Barcodes have Hamming distance >=2 and are non-overlapping with CEL-Seq2 barcodes.

oligos.name: randomhexRT primer
oligos.role: Random-hexamer reverse-transcription primer used during library preparation on fragmented aRNA; installs the Illumina TruSeq small-RNA 3' (RA3)/P7 priming handle at the insert 3' end.

components.name: RA3 / P7 priming handle
components.role: Illumina TruSeq small-RNA RA3 handle (annealed by RPi index primer to add i7 + P7)

components.name: Random hexamer
components.role: random hexamer priming on fragmented aRNA

oligos.notes: N bases ordered hand-mixed. Replaces the barcoded poly-dT approach when unbiased whole-RNA sampling is desired.

oligos.name: RNA PCR Primer 1 (RP1)
oligos.role: Library PCR primer that adds the Illumina P5 adapter; overlaps the small-RNA (RA5) adapter carried by the DamID adapter / CEL-Seq2 primer.
oligos.notes: Illumina TruSeq small-RNA RNA PCR Primer 1. 3'-terminal phosphorothioate bond (…GTCCG*A).

oligos.name: RNA PCR Index Primer (RPi)
oligos.role: Library PCR primer that adds the i7 library/sample index and the Illumina P7 adapter; overlaps the RA3/hexRT handle.

components.name: i7 index
components.role: i7 library/sample index (one per pooled library)

components.name: RA3 / hexRT handle overlap
components.role: overlap with the RA3 / randomhexRT handle

oligos.notes: Illumina TruSeq small-RNA RNA PCR index primer (RPiN). Example with index CGTGAT: CAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGATCGTGATGTGACTGGAGTTCCTTGGCACCCGAGAATTCC*A. 3'-terminal phosphorothioate bond.

oligos.name: Illumina P5 adapter
oligos.role: P5 flow-cell binding sequence (added by RP1).

oligos.name: Illumina P7 adapter
oligos.role: P7 flow-cell binding sequence (added by RPi). In the final-library top strand it appears as its reverse complement ATCTCGTATGCCGTCTTCTGCTTG.

oligos.name: Illumina TruSeq small RNA Read 1 primer (RA5)
oligos.role: Read 1 sequencing primer; anneals to the RA5 small-RNA adapter and reads UMI + barcode + junction + insert start.
oligos.notes: Small-RNA 5' adapter (RA5) region shared by the DamID adapter and CEL-Seq2 primer; primes Read 1.

oligos.name: Illumina TruSeq small RNA Read 2 primer (RA3)
oligos.role: Read 2 sequencing primer; anneals to the RA3 small-RNA 3' adapter and reads the cDNA (transcriptome) or gDNA (DamID) insert.
oligos.notes: Illumina TruSeq small-RNA 3' adapter (RA3) region; introduced via the randomhexRT primer handle.

oligos.name: T7 promoter
oligos.role: T7 RNA polymerase promoter present in both the DamID adapter and the CEL-Seq2 primer; drives linear in-vitro-transcription amplification of gDNA and cDNA in a single reaction.

final_library.source_label: scDam&T-seq DamID (protein-DNA) library — Illumina TruSeq small-RNA architecture (the transcriptome library is identical except the GA-gDNA insert is replaced by poly(dT) + cDNA)
annotation_lines: GTTCAGAGTTCTACAGTCCGACGATC = Illumina TruSeq small RNA 5' adapter (RA5) / Read 1 primer site
GA = reconstituted GATC junction (DpnI ligation half)
TGGAATTCTCGGGTGCCAAGG = Illumina TruSeq small RNA 3' adapter (RA3) / Read 2 primer site

evidence.locator: scDam&T-seq DamID (protein-DNA) library — Illumina TruSeq small-RNA architecture (the transcriptome library is identical except the GA-gDNA insert is replaced by poly(dT) + cDNA)

reads.primer: Illumina TruSeq small RNA Read 1 primer (RA5)
Illumina TruSeq small RNA Read 2 primer (RA3)

library_generation.title: Single-cell sort into barcoded CEL-Seq2 primer
library_generation.note: After in vivo Dam/Dam-POI induction, single cells are Hoechst/PI-stained and FACS-sorted into 384-well plates, each well pre-loaded with mineral oil and one unique CEL-Seq2 RT primer.
library_generation.product:
well n:
  |-- mineral oil
  |-- CEL-Seq2 primer:
      5'- GCCGGTAATACGACTCACTATAGGGAGTTCTACAGTCCGACGATC[UMI:3][CELL_BARCODE:4][UMI:3][CELL_BARCODE:4](T)25V -3'
  |-- 1 sorted single cell (Dam/Dam-POI-methylated m6A-GATC genome + polyadenylated mRNA)

library_generation.title: Cell lysis
library_generation.note: Igepal-based lysis at 65 C releases mRNA and genomic DNA into the well; RNase inhibitor and ERCC spike-ins are present.
library_generation.product:
in-well contents:
  mRNA:   5'- XXXXXXXX...XXXXXXXX-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAA -3'
  gDNA:   5'- ...Gm6ATC......Gm6ATC... -3'  (protein-DNA proximal GATC methylated in vivo)
  primer: 5'- ...T7...RA5...[UMI][BARCODE](T)25V -3'

library_generation.title: mRNA reverse transcription (CEL-Seq2)
library_generation.note: SuperScript II reverse-transcribes polyadenylated mRNA primed by the poly(dT) CEL-Seq2 primer, adding the barcode/UMI/RA5/T7 to the cDNA 3' end.
library_generation.product:
mRNA:cDNA hybrid (CEL-Seq2 branch):
5'- XXXXXXXX...XXXXXXXXXXXXX-AAAAAAAAAAA        -3'  (mRNA)
3'- XXXXXXXX...cDNA-XXXXXXX-V(T)25[BC][UMI][BC][UMI]CTAGCAGCCTGACATCTTGAGGGATATCACTCAGCATAATGGCCG -5'
                                                    (RA5 -- T7 promoter, from CEL-Seq2 primer)

library_generation.title: Second-strand synthesis (ds cDNA)
library_generation.note: E. coli DNA ligase + DNA polymerase I + RNase H convert the mRNA:cDNA hybrid into double-stranded cDNA bearing a functional T7 promoter.
library_generation.product:
double-stranded cDNA (T7-competent, CEL-Seq2 branch):
5'- ...cDNA...(A)n ATGA[BC]CATC[UMI]GATCGTCGGACTGTAGAACTCC CTATAGTGAGTCGTATTACCGGC -3'
3'- ...cDNA...(T)n TACT[BC]GTAG[UMI]CTAGCAGCCTGACATCTTGAGG GATATCACTCAGCATAATGGCCG -5'
                                                        (T7 promoter double-stranded)

library_generation.title: Proteinase K treatment
library_generation.note: Proteinase K removes chromatin-associated proteins and nucleases from the genomic DNA, exposing methylated GATC sites for restriction.
library_generation.product:
gDNA (DamID branch), protein-free:
5'- ...XXXXX Gm6A T C XXXXX...XXXXX Gm6A T C XXXXX... -3'
3'- ...XXXXX C T Am6G XXXXX...XXXXX C T Am6G XXXXX... -5'

library_generation.title: DpnI digestion of methylated GATC
library_generation.note: DpnI cleaves only fully methylated (m6A) GATC motifs, producing blunt ends specifically at Dam/Dam-POI-marked sites; unmethylated GATC is left intact.
library_generation.product:
blunt-ended gDNA fragment at a methylated GATC (DamID branch):
5'- ...XXXXX G A        T C XXXXX... -3'
3'- ...XXXXX C T        A G XXXXX... -5'
                (blunt cut GA | TC)

library_generation.title: DamID adapter ligation
library_generation.note: T4 DNA ligase ligates the 5'-phosphorylated, forked, barcoded double-stranded DamID adapter to the blunt DpnI ends, adding the barcode/UMI/RA5/T7 and reconstituting the GATC junction.
library_generation.product:
adapter-ligated gDNA (DamID branch):
5'- GGTGATCCGG TAATACGACTCACTATAGGG GTTCAGAGTTCTACAGTCCGACGATC NNN TGCA NNN TATG GA TCXXXXX...gDNA -3'
3'-      AGCTT ...CCGGGATTATGCTGAGTGATAT CAAGTCTCAAGATGTCAGGCTGCTAG NNN ACGT NNN ATACCT   AGXXXXX...gDNA -5'
     (fork)      (T7 promoter)              (RA5 adapter)                (UMI/barcode)   (GATC)

library_generation.title: Pool cells and bead purify
library_generation.note: Because DamID and CEL-Seq2 barcodes are unique and non-overlapping per cell, all wells are pooled and the barcoded gDNA + cDNA molecules are cleaned with magnetic beads before amplification.
library_generation.product:
pooled, purified barcoded molecules (both branches):
  DamID: 5'- T7 - RA5 - [UMI][BARCODE] - GA[gDNA] -3'
  cDNA:  5'- T7 - RA5 - [UMI][BARCODE] - (dT)[cDNA] -3'

library_generation.title: In-vitro-transcription (T7) linear amplification
library_generation.note: MEGAscript T7 transcribes every T7-tagged molecule, linearly amplifying both cDNA and gDNA into antisense amplified RNA (aRNA) in one reaction (no separation of DNA and RNA).
library_generation.product:
aRNA (antisense copies, both branches), e.g. DamID:
5'- G GGGUUCAGAGUUCUACAGUCCGACGAUC NNN UGCA NNN UAUGGA - [gDNA] -3'   (aRNA)
     (T7 start)  (RA5)                (UMI/barcode)      (insert)

library_generation.title: aRNA fragmentation
library_generation.note: aRNA is chemically fragmented in salt buffer at 94 C to a size suitable for Illumina sequencing, then bead-purified.
library_generation.product:
fragmented aRNA (300-700 nt), e.g.:
5'- ...RA5-[UMI][BARCODE]-[insert fragment] -3'
5'- ...[insert fragment] -3'

library_generation.title: Library-prep reverse transcription (randomhexRT)
library_generation.note: Fragmented aRNA is reverse-transcribed with the randomhexRT primer, which installs the Illumina TruSeq small-RNA 3' (RA3)/P7 priming handle at the insert 3' end.
library_generation.product:
first-strand library cDNA:
5'- [insert fragment] ... -3'
3'- [insert fragment complement] NNNNNN ACCTTAAGAGCCCACGGTTCCG -5'
                                (random hexamer)  (RA3 / P7 handle, from randomhexRT primer)

library_generation.title: PCR indexing (add P5, i7, P7)
library_generation.note: NEBNext PCR with RNA PCR Primer 1 (adds P5 via the RA5 overlap) and an RNA PCR index primer (adds the i7 library index + P7 via the RA3 overlap) completes the Illumina library; 8-12 cycles.
library_generation.product:
final DamID (protein-DNA) library, top strand 5'->3':
AATGATACGGCGACCACCGAGATCTACAC GTTCAGAGTTCTACAGTCCGACGATC [UMI:3][CELL_BARCODE:4][UMI:3][CELL_BARCODE:4] GA [CDNA] TGGAATTCTCGGGTGCCAAGG AACTCCAGTCAC [SAMPLE_INDEX:6] ATCTCGTATGCCGTCTTCTGCTTG
 P5                            RA5 (Read1)                 UMI/barcode                            GATC gDNA  RA3 (Read2)          linker       i7 index         revcomp(P7)

library_generation.title: Sequencing
library_generation.note: Libraries are quantified and sequenced paired-end (75x75) on an Illumina NextSeq 500 with 20% PhiX spike-in.

library_sequencing.note: Reads the split 6-nt UMI + split 8-nt sample/cell barcode + reconstituted GATC 'GA' junction, then into the insert start. The same R1 layout carries the barcode for both the DamID (gDNA) and CEL-Seq2 (mRNA) molecules. Paper preprocessing layout: 5'-[UMI][barcode]GA[gDNA]-3' for DamID (AG for AluI) or 5'-[UMI][barcode][mRNA]-3' for transcriptome.
library_sequencing.diagram:
Read 1 primer (RA5), template = bottom, read →
         5'- GTTCAGAGTTCTACAGTCCGACGATC----------------------------->
top  5'- ...GTTCAGAGTTCTACAGTCCGACGATCNNNNNNNNNNNNNNGA[insert]... -3'
bot  3'- ...CAAGTCTCAAGATGTCAGGCTGCTAGNNNNNNNNNNNNNNCT[insert]... -5'
                                    └UMI+barcode(14)┘GATC

library_sequencing.primer: Illumina TruSeq small-RNA i7 index primer (anneals to the RA3 / linker handle)
library_sequencing.note: Reads the 6-nt i7 library/sample index (RPi) that identifies the pooled 384-well library.
library_sequencing.diagram:
i7 index primer, read →
         5'- ...GCCAAGGAACTCCAGTCAC------>
top  5'- ...GCCAAGGAACTCCAGTCACNNNNNNATCTCGTATGCCGTCTTCTGCTTG -3'
bot  3'- ...CGGTTCCTTGAGGTCAGTGNNNNNNTAGAGCATACGGCAGAAGACGAAC -5'
                              └i7(6)┘            (P7)

library_sequencing.note: Reads the insert from the opposite (3') end — the cDNA for the transcriptome product or the gDNA mate for the DamID product. Only R2 carries the mRNA sequence for transcriptomic read pairs.
library_sequencing.diagram:
Read 2 primer (RA3), template = top, read ←
top  5'- ...[insert]CCTTGGCACCCGAGAATTCCAAACTCCAGTCAC... -3'
bot  3'- ...[insert]GGAACCGTGGGCTCTTAAGGTTTGAGGTCAGTG... -5'
              <----------GGAACCGTGGGCTCTTAAGGT   (RA3, 3'→5')

title: scDam&T-seq
description: scDam&T-seq is a single-cell multi-omics method that simultaneously quantifies protein–DNA contacts (via DamID) and the transcriptome (via CEL-Seq2) from the same cell. A protein of interest is fused to E. coli Dam adenine methyltransferase, which deposits m6A at GATC motifs near its DNA-binding sites in vivo. In sorted single cells, polyadenylated mRNA is reverse-transcribed with a barcoded CEL-Seq2 primer and made double-stranded; genomic DNA is stripped of protein, the m6A-marked GATC sites are cut with DpnI, and a barcoded double-stranded DamID adapter is ligated to the blunt ends. Both the DamID adapter and the CEL-Seq2 primer carry a T7 promoter, so pooled cDNA and gDNA are co-amplified linearly by in vitro transcription, then converted into an Illumina TruSeq small-RNA library. Read 1 reads the cell/sample barcode + UMI + insert start, Read 2 reads the cDNA or gDNA insert, and the i7 read identifies the library pool. DamID contacts are scored as observed-over-expected (OE) UMI counts per genomic bin.

reference.label: Simultaneous quantification of protein-DNA contacts and transcriptomes in single cells

original_publication.title: Simultaneous quantification of protein–DNA contacts and transcriptomes in single cells

throughput.summary: Plate-based single-cell method: cells FACS-sorted one per well into 384-well plates; hundreds to thousands of cells per experiment. >100-fold throughput increase over the original scDamID via pooled T7/IVT amplification.
throughput.cells: Single cells per 384-well plate; libraries typically 96–384 barcoded cells; KBM7 and hybrid 129/Sv:CAST/EiJ mESC lines (Dam, Dam-LMNB1, Dam-RING1B).
throughput.rna: Transcriptome (CEL-Seq2): median ~11,000–12,000 unique transcripts and ~3,700–3,900 genes per cell (protocol); ~4,010 unique transcripts / ~2,282 genes per cell in the original KBM7 comparison.
throughput.dna: DamID (protein-DNA): median ~42,192 unique DamID reads per cell (KBM7); ~125,000–175,000 unique GATC counts per sample in the protocol; typical analysis resolution 50–100 kb bins.

publication.statistical_model: UMI-based unique-event counting with observed-over-expected (OE) scoring per genomic bin; contacts binarized at OE >= 1 and summarized as contact frequency (CF). Expression counts modeled relative to Poisson with negative-binomial-like overdispersion (variance-to-mean ratio de-trended); differential contact/expression tested with t-tests, edgeR exact tests, and Spearman/Pearson correlations.

other.label: Untethered Dam
other.value: an untethered-Dam control doubles as a chromatin-accessibility readout; substituting DpnI with AluI yields reduced-representation whole-genome (CNV) data

other.label: Sequencing
other.value: Illumina NextSeq 500, 75 bp paired-end, 20% PhiX spike-in

other.label: Data availability
other.value: GEO GSE108639; analysis pipeline at https://github.com/KindLab/scDamAndTools

other.label: Protocol reference
other.value: Markodimitraki et al., Nature Protocols 15, 1922–1953 (2020), doi:10.1038/s41596-020-0314-8

data_processing.summary: Paired-end reads are demultiplexed simultaneously on the DamID and CEL-Seq2 cell/sample barcodes (no mismatches) with UMIs extracted from R1; gDNA reads (R1) have the restriction-motif dinucleotide 'GA' (GATC/DpnI) or 'AG' (AGCT/AluI) prepended and are aligned with bowtie2, while transcriptome reads (R2) are aligned with tophat2; alignments are UMI-deduplicated per motif/strand(/allele), counted as unique methylation events (DamID) or unique transcripts (RNA), binned in 100-kb windows and scored as observed-over-expected (OE), with expression normalized in scran and differential analysis in edgeR.
data_processing.statistical_model: Observed-over-expected (OE) unique-event scoring per 100-kb genomic bin, contacts binarized at OE≥1 to contact frequency (CF); UMI-based unique-molecule counting; expression counts modeled as overdispersed (negative-binomial-like), differential expression via edgeR exact test.
